data.name: Amber's Quest
data.detailed_description:
PREMISE

In the early 20th century, the promise of fame and fortune fuels humanity’s hunger to explore the unknown. Among these dreamers is Amber, a young archaeologist desperate to prove himself. When he uncovers an ancient inscription hinting at a hidden city of unimaginable riches deep in South America, his path becomes clear: he will be the one to find it.

SYNOPSIS

Driven by ambition and adventure, Amber sets out with his companions Gabriel and Mateo to navigate the treacherous Colorado River in search of the Lost City of Caesars. Explore their perilous journey in this 18+ visual novel of adventure, discovery, and unexpected intimacy.

GAME FEATURES

  • Engaging Story: ≈75k words (approx. 6 hours of play)

  • Stunning Original Artwork: Sprite and CG art by Aark0

  • Detailed CGs: 20+ CGs (not counting variations)

  • 18+ Intimate Scenes

  • In-Game Achievements

  • And so much more!

data.short_description: Amber, Gabriel, and Mateo journey deep into South America, chasing the legend of the Lost City of Caesars. Join them as they uncover hidden truths, explore newfound romance, and chase the treasures buried beneath the jungle.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 11
  • 處理器: 1GHz
